issues.detail: The skill file does not explicitly cover all error scenarios and edge cases.
The skill file contains verbose explanations that could be trimmed for brevity.

scenarios.name: Reliable structured JSON extraction from receipts with Claude
scenarios.rationale: Baseline simply asks for JSON with no Claude-specific structure or schema example; treatment uses the documented <task>/<format>/<receipt> XML pattern with a JSON schema example, missing-field rules, few-shot examples, and edge-case testing guidance.

scenarios.name: Boost multi-step word problem accuracy without fine-tuning
scenarios.rationale: Baseline offers generic 'use a bigger model, show your work' advice without naming techniques; treatment applies zero-shot and few-shot Chain-of-Thought, adds a Self-Consistency majority-vote code snippet, and mentions Tree-of-Thought for branching problems.
